description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure is surrounded by a well-manicured lawn and features a driveway leading to a garage, as well as a swimming pool and a glass-enclosed patio area at the rear. The front facade is defined by large windows and a prominent entryway, while the rear showcases expansive glass doors opening to the backyard. The property is bordered by a low wall and is adjacent to a wide street, emphasizing its urban setting. The exterior materials appear to be primarily white plaster or concrete, with accents of wood and glass, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall layout is open and spacious, with outdoor living spaces integrated seamlessly into the design.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, set within a landscaped urban lot. The design features clean lines, white walls, and glass accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and street access, with the lawn and entry path visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition from the street to the property, with the pool and patio area partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, glass-enclosed patio, and the open lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and the relationship between the house and the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
